deep_dive.title: RECTOR: Masked Region-Channel-Temporal Modeling for Affective and Cognitive Representation Learning
deep_dive.abstract: Affective and cognitive disorders manifest as distributed, time-varying brain network dynamics across regions, channels, and time, challenging robust representation learning from EEG/sEEG for clinical diagnosis. We propose RECTOR (Masked Region-Channel-Temporal Modeling), an end-to-end self-supervised framework that unifies joint region-channel-temporal representation learning beyond fixed anatomical priors. At its core, RECTOR-SA is a hierarchical, block-sparse self-attention induced by Adaptive Functional Partitioning that evolves region structures from static anatomical definitions to adaptive functional regions. The self-supervision is driven by Masked Topology and Representation Learning, which jointly optimizes three complementary objectives: Masked Predictive Modeling, Topological Structure Modeling, and Cross-View Consistency. Across diverse benchmarks, RECTOR sets a new state-of-the-art in EEG emotion recognition and sEEG task-engagement classification. Crucially, its strong robustness to missing channels and cross-montage generalization underscores its potential for large-scale pre-training on heterogeneous EEG/sEEG, providing interpretable insights at both region and channel levels.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Adaptive functional partitioning beyond fixed anatomical priors
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 超越固定解剖先验的自适应功能分区
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 超越固定解剖先验的自适应功能分区
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 超越固定解剖先验的自适应功能分区
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: RECTOR proposes a self-supervised framework with adaptive functional partitioning that evolves region structures from static anatomical definitions to adaptive functional regions, directly addressing brain region priors in EEG.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该文针对EEG表示学习依赖固定解剖先验的问题，提出RECTOR端到端自监督框架，通过自适应功能分区将静态解剖区域演化为自适应功能区域，实现超越固定先验的联合区域-通道-时间表征学习。实验表明该方法能有效捕捉脑网络动态，为EEG分析提供了灵活的先验机制。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该文针对EEG表示学习依赖固定解剖先验的问题，提出RECTOR端到端自监督框架，通过自适应功能分区将静态解剖区域演化为自适应功能区域，实现超越固定先验的联合区域-通道-时间表征学习。实验表明该方法能有效捕捉脑网络动态，为EEG分析提供了灵活的先验机制。

quick_skim.title: Gaussian Spatial Priors for Anatomy-Aware Object Detection in Surgical Videos
quick_skim.abstract: Detecting anatomical structures in surgical video is essential for intraoperative safety frameworks such as the Critical View of Myopectineal Orifice (CVMPO) in inguinal hernia repair. While prominent structures like the Cooper's Ligament and Triangle of Doom are reliably detected by standard methods, smaller structures such as the epigastric vessels remain challenging due to their visual ambiguity and intermittent visibility. We observe that the spatial relationship between structures is anatomically constrained, and propose a Gaussian Spatial Prior (GSP) module that encodes this relationship as a compact, parametric bias injected into the self-attention of a DAB-DETR decoder. The prior is computed offline from training annotations as a small set of frozen Gaussian parameters and recomputed at each decoder layer using the iteratively refined reference points. On a dataset of inguinal hernia repair videos with 5-fold cross-validation, GSP improves dependent class detection by $+33.5\%$ ($\text{AP}_{50}$) over DAB-DETR and $+53.9\%$ over YOLOv26, while also improving anchor detection by $+6.0\%$. These gains are statistically significant across all folds ($p=0.012$, paired $t-$test).
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Gaussian Spatial Priors for anatomy-aware detection, transferable to EEG brain region priors
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 用于手术视频中解剖结构检测的高斯空间先验，可迁移至EEG脑区先验
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 用于手术视频中解剖结构检测的高斯空间先验，可迁移至EEG脑区先验
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 用于手术视频中解剖结构检测的高斯空间先验，可迁移至EEG脑区先验
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes Gaussian Spatial Priors (GSP) injected into DETR decoder for anatomy-aware object detection in surgical videos; method could apply to EEG source localization as anatomical priors.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对手术视频中小型解剖结构检测困难的问题，本文提出高斯空间先验（GSP）模块，将解剖结构间的空间关系作为参数化偏置注入DAB-DETR解码器的自注意力中。实验表明GSP显著提升了困难结构的检测精度。该先验方法虽用于手术视频，但其核心思想——利用空间先验约束检测区域——可直接迁移至EEG源定位中的脑区先验建模，为EEG分析提供新的先验形式。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对手术视频中小型解剖结构检测困难的问题，本文提出高斯空间先验（GSP）模块，将解剖结构间的空间关系作为参数化偏置注入DAB-DETR解码器的自注意力中。实验表明GSP显著提升了困难结构的检测精度。该先验方法虽用于手术视频，但其核心思想——利用空间先验约束检测区域——可直接迁移至EEG源定位中的脑区先验建模，为EEG分析提供新的先验形式。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: anatomical prior information in EEG analysis
